oracle_sql: SELECT * FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE UPPER(email) LIKE '%@GMAIL.COM%'
mysql_sql: SELECT * FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE email LIKE '%@gmail.com%'
SELECT * FROM ORDERS ORDER BY orderdate DESC LIMIT 10

oracle_sql: SELECT orderid, NVL(netamount, 0) FROM ORDERS WHERE customerid = 500
mysql_sql: SELECT orderid, IFNULL(netamount, 0) FROM ORDERS WHERE customerid = 500

oracle_sql: SELECT * FROM ORDERS WHERE orderdate >= SYSDATE - 30
mysql_sql: SELECT * FROM ORDERS WHERE orderdate >= DATE(NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY)

oracle_sql: SELECT c.firstname, o.totalamount FROM CUSTOMERS c JOIN ORDERS o ON c.country = TO_CHAR(o.orderdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND ROWNUM <= 100
mysql_sql: SELECT c.firstname, o.totalamount FROM CUSTOMERS c JOIN ORDERS o ON c.customerid = o.customerid LIMIT 100

SELECT DISTINCT c.* FROM CUSTOMERS c
    JOIN ORDERS o ON c.customerid = o.customerid
    JOIN ORDERLINES ol ON o.orderid = ol.orderid
    JOIN PRODUCTS p ON ol.prod_id = p.prod_id
    WHERE p.category = 4

oracle_sql: SELECT * FROM ORDERS WHERE orderdate >= SYSDATE - 365
mysql_sql: SELECT * FROM ORDERS WHERE orderdate >= NOW() - INTERVAL 365 DAY

oracle_sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(orderdate, 'YYYY-MM'), COUNT(*), SUM(totalamount) FROM ORDERS GROUP BY TO_CHAR(orderdate, 'YYYY-MM')
mysql_sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(orderdate, '%Y-%m'), COUNT(*), SUM(totalamount) FROM ORDERS GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(orderdate, '%Y-%m')

oracle_sql: SELECT * FROM ORDERS WHERE orderdate >= TO_DATE('2013-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mysql_sql: SELECT * FROM ORDERS WHERE orderdate >= STR_TO_DATE('2013-01-01', '%Y-%m-%d')

oracle_sql: SELECT TRUNC(orderdate, 'MM'), COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS GROUP BY TRUNC(orderdate, 'MM')
mysql_sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(orderdate, '%Y-%m-01'), COUNT(*) FROM ORDERS GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(orderdate, '%Y-%m-01')
